text.title: Gemini Function Calling Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to ship Gemini function calling in manual mode.

step.name: declare-functions
step.action: Add docstring + type hints to every tool function. Keep parameter types simple (str / int / float / bool / list / dict only at top level).
step.output: Tool functions ready for SDK reflection.

step.name: set-mode
step.action: manual mode for prod; automatic only for prototype script. Record choice in gemini-fc-config.json.
step.decision-gate: Auto in prod → reject in code review.

step.name: wire-manual-loop
step.action: Loop: send messages, inspect response.function_calls, validate args, dispatch, append function_response, repeat. Cap at 15 iterations.

step.name: grounding-decision
step.action: Enable google_search only on calls that need live web data; record cost expectation in PR.
step.output: search_grounding flag default off; per-call override.
step.decision-gate: Daily cost report compares grounding-on vs off.

step.name: json-output
step.action: Use response_mime_type="application/json" + response_schema for typed output; avoid forcing a tool just for shape.
step.output: response_schema field set on relevant calls.
step.decision-gate: Validate parsed JSON against the schema; alert on parse failure.

step.name: eval
step.action: Run end-to-end; measure tool-selection accuracy + JSON-validity rate + cost-per-call.
